data.title: Tim Draper launches $200M fund 8 after $3.5B Bitcoin windfall. Focus on future amid crypto industry surge.
data.description: Renowned venture capitalist Tim Draper has announced the establishment of a new fund, Draper Associates Fund 8, valued at $200 million, as per records filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This move coincides with a flourishing period for the cryptocurrency industry, which has been achieving unparalleled success in recent times, as stated in a report by Fortune. The firm's website acknowledges this milestone, emphasizing its enduring four-decade history in venture capital and its refreshed focus on upcoming opportunities. The announcement underlines the firm's commitment to the future, with a statement mentioning the team's vision for the next 40 years. While specific details have not been disclosed, a spokesperson has refrained from commenting further. This latest fund introduction indicates... Full story accessible on finance website Benzinga.com.

data.title: Xantrion ranks 29 on San Francisco Business Times' Largest Family-Owned Business list. Pride in Prestigious Recognition.
data.description: In Oakland, California on July 24, 2025, Xantrion, a top provider of managed IT and cybersecurity services, celebrates being named one of the Largest Family-Owned Businesses in the Bay Area by the San Francisco Business Times. This prestigious acknowledgment highlights Xantrion's success in the region.

data.title: Autoport and Primal Motorsports partner to offer Radical-driven motorsport experiences at Uwharrie Motorsports Park. Elite founding members receive a free Radical SR1 XXR.
data.description: In an exclusive offer, select founding members will be gifted a complimentary Radical SR1 XXR by Autoport, a pioneering figure in motorsports real estate and infrastructure development. This partnership has been established with Primal Motorsports, the leading dealer of Radical Motorsport racecars. The initiative was announced in Moore County, North Carolina on July 24, 2025.

data.title: Provectus Algae secures $12.6M in Series A round with $10.1M financing and $2.5M grant for methane-reducing supplement.
data.description: Provectus Algae, based in Noosaville, Australia, has secured a total of $12.6 million in funding for its methane-reducing feed supplement. This includes $10.1 million from Series A financing and an additional $2.5 million in grant funding from the Australian government. This funding will support the development and production of the innovative agricultural technology.

data.title: CGS to restructure, creating four new entities to boost growth and innovation.
data.description: A new study has revealed that the number of COVID-19 cases in the country has surged by 25% over the past week, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to over 1.5 million. The study also found that the virus has a mortality rate of 2.5%, resulting in over 37,500 deaths so far. The government is considering imposing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus as hospitals are nearing full capacity with over 10,000 patients currently admitted for treatment.

data.title: Economist Mohamed El-Erian suggests Jerome Powell should resign to protect Fed's independence amid Trump's criticisms. El-Erian emphasizes Fed's operational autonomy as crucial. 203 characters
data.description: Economist Mohamed El-Erian proposed a possible strategic move for Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell's resignation to protect the Fed's autonomy. El-Erian highlighted recent U.S. government criticism of the Fed's mission creep and officials' effectiveness as reasons for Powell to consider stepping down. El-Erian emphasized the importance of safeguarding the Fed's operational independence and suggested that Powell's resignation could achieve this goal. The U.S. government has expanded its critique to include concerns about mission creep and the effectiveness of other Fed officials. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Obama-era economic advisor Betsey Stevenson warns that ending Fed independence could lead to higher mortgage rates, with the exact increase depending on market predictions of inflation rates.
data.description: Betsey Stevenson, an economist and former Obama White House advisor at the University of Michigan, has raised concerns about the potential repercussions of eliminating the independence of the Federal Reserve. In a recent statement, she highlighted the possibility of a significant increase in mortgage rates if the market loses confidence in the central bank's ability to control inflation. Stevenson emphasized that terminating the Fed's independence could pave the way for higher mortgage rates. The extent of this increase would depend on the accuracy of predictions regarding elevated inflation rates, which may come from banks, investors, or borrowers. This cautionary statement was made in reference to a Bloomberg post and can be linked with ongoing discussions surrounding President Trump's potential candidate for the Federal Reserve. For the complete article, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ex-Trump advisor Judy Shelton criticizes Federal Reserve for $900 billion losses, questions central bank independence.
data.description: Former advisor to President Donald Trump and economist Judy Shelton, who is now a senior fellow at the Independent Institute, criticized the Federal Reserve in a speech. Shelton echoed former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh's call for "monetary regime change" and suggested a structural overhaul of the central bank, questioning its independence. She highlighted deep-seated issues within the Fed beyond short-term rate decisions, criticizing its models, constructs, and meeting processes. Shelton's remarks indicate a need for significant reform within the institution. The full story can be found on a financial news platform.

data.title: Inventor Jerrica Williams develops BAKER'S BUDDY turntable for bakers, enabling hands-free piping and decorating.
data.description: A resident of Bartow, Florida named Jerrica Williams shared how her mother, a baker, created the innovative BAKER'S BUDDY to modernize traditional turntables. This invention enables bakers to enhance their piping and decorating tasks with the use of both hands. The product was developed to bring millennium style to baking techniques and has garnered attention for its practical design.

data.title: Inventor from Glenwood Springs, Colo. invents Power Tool Warmer to keep lithium-ion batteries warm; DNV-760.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, an inventor from Glenwood Springs, Colorado revealed a new innovation called the POWER TOOL WARMER. The creator noted the necessity of keeping lithium-ion batteries warm while working outdoors in extreme cold or overnight conditions. This invention aims to address this need by providing a solution for tool users. By utilizing the POWER TOOL WARMER, individuals can ensure the optimal functioning of their equipment even in low temperatures, enhancing efficiency and performance.

data.title: Inventor from Dolton, Ill. develops BRUSH ON THE GO electric toothbrush (CHK-3138) for mess-free brushing; aims to simplify oral care.
data.description: A resident of Dolton, Illinois, expressed his innovative idea of the BRUSH ON THE GO on July 24, 2025, in Pittsburgh. The inventor aimed to provide a convenient and clean method for teeth brushing to the public. The new product innovatively cleans teeth and freshens breath, while also removing the inconveniences of traditional toothbrush usage. This creation by the inventor aims to revolutionize oral hygiene by providing a hassle-free experience to users.

data.title: Global Knee Replacement Surgery Market to reach $16.17 billion by 2030, growing at 6.1% CAGR from 2025, valued at $12.00 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of July 24, 2025, the worldwide Knee Replacement Surgery Market increased from US$10.86 billion in 2023 to US$12.00 billion in 2025. Experts predict a steady growth with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.1% from 2025 to 2030, reaching an estimated worth of US$16.17 billion by the end of the forecast period.

data.title: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. to hold second-quarter 2025 earnings call on August 7, 2025, at 10:00am ET. Results for quarter ended June 30 to be released before market opens.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) announced that it will conduct its Q2 2025 earnings conference call on August 7, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET. The Company will disclose its financial results for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025, prior to the market opening that day.
$WIX TO OFFER PAYPAL PAYMENT OPTIONS FOR MERCHANTS ON ITS PLATFORM — ENHANCING E-COMMERCE FLEXIBILITY

data.title: 84 Lumber sponsors 2025 US Capitol Christmas Tree from Nevada's Humboldt-Toiyabe National Forest in historic first.
data.description: In a monumental event for Nevada's Humboldt-Toiyabe National Forest, a "Christmas in July" celebration took place on July 24, 2025. This marked a historic occasion as, for the first time ever, the U.S. Capitol Christmas Tree, also referred to as "The People's Tree," will originate from Nevada. The tree selected for this prestigious honor represents a significant milestone, symbolizing unity and national pride. This remarkable achievement highlights the importance of the forest's conservation efforts, emphasizing Nevada's unique contribution to the nation's holiday traditions. This event underscores the significance of this year's Christmas celebration, with the tree's journey set to captivate audiences across the country.

data.title: DOGE at $0.24 (-2.73% daily) tests support after hitting $0.25 resistance. $3.78B futures interest indicates bullish potential.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogecoin (DOGE) is currently trading at $0.24, showing a daily decrease of 2.73% from its recent peak of $0.25. There is notable activity from large investors (whales) amassing holdings, indicating positive market sentiment. Additionally, there is significant interest in futures contracts amounting to $3.78 billion, hinting at the possibility of the bullish trend continuing.

data.title: Direct Wire achieves major milestones with 12.5mm OFE rod production and ISO 9001:2015 certification in Lancaster, PA.
data.description: In Lancaster, Pennsylvania on July 24, 2025, Direct Wire, a prominent company in the wire and cable sector, has revealed significant achievements at its cutting-edge oxygen-free copper rod mill. The company can now manufacture 12.5mm oxygen-free electronic (OFE) copper rod, marking a significant advancement.

data.title: Vietnam prefabricated construction market to grow at 10.6% CAGR, set to reach VND 42.36 trillion by 2029 -ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Vietnam Prefabricated Construction Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook - Q2 2025 Update" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Vietnamese prefabricated construction market is projected to see a 12.6% annual growth, reaching VND 25.21 trillion by 2025. This market has shown consistent growth trends.

data.title: Saudi Arabia's prefabricated construction market to reach SAR 46.20 billion by 2029 with CAGR of 6.6% by 2025-2029.
data.description: A recent report on the Saudi Arabia Prefabricated Construction Market forecasts a growth of 7.9% annually, reaching SAR 33.25 billion by 2025. The report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, highlights over 100 key performance indicators, market size, and forecasts by end markets, precast products, and precast materials. Saudi Arabia has seen significant growth in its prefabricated construction sector.
